title: Pearl Trajectory Predictor
description: Allows you to see where the ender pearl will fall
body:
# PearlTrajectoryPredictor

Allows you to see where the ender pearl will fall

## Features:
- Ability to view the estimated teleportation location from above by holding down the CTRL key
- View the estimated teleportation location using a marker


### If you like this mod, please consider giving it a ⭐ -- it really helps!

## Video example
